title: Incident: /orders/totals returning incorrect net_total
body:
Finance flagged mismatched totals on the daily reconciliation report — net_total < gross_total for customers who shouldn't have any active discount.

Sentry: ORDERS-201
Release suspected: 2026.04.18-promo-q1

Need root cause + hotfix through CI. Blast radius: any order with status='pending' since ~2026-04-18.

title: Feature: dashboard for inventory turnover
body: Inventory team wants a dashboard showing items by category + turnover rate. Depends on PR #44 being merged first.

title: Flaky: integration.test.js fails intermittently on main
body:
CI has been red ~1 in 10 runs since last week. Not clear if it's related to the Q1 campaign merge or independent.

Not blocking deploys but worth looking into.
